'''Bundim''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Trax sector/Legends|Trax sector]] where the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] lost the [[Battle of Heg]]. [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Resner]] believed that Bundim was base of operations for the Alliance forces that began rebelling in Trax Sector, shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. The planetary government secretly attempted to remove the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] presence from the planet, but an inside source alerted the Empire to Bundim's plans.

The Empire's [[Subjugation of Bundim|response]] was swift, and meant to make an example of Bundim for the rest of the [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. A number of merchant [[Starship/Legends|ships]] were destroyed and many cities leveled in aerial bombardments. Bundim was garrisoned and subjugated in less than a week. The Alliance worked diligently to help the natives liberate themselves, but their efforts were nearly thwarted after the [[Battle of Heg]]. [[Kentara]], one of the first Alliance agents captured, later returned and helped to complete the liberation work.
